creator: ari@ish.com.au
text:
There are significant issues when trying to use the existing port, and that's possibly due to the age of the port.

I started working on it, by changing the top of the Makefile to:

PORTNAME=       galera
PORTVERSION=    25.3.16
CATEGORIES=     databases
MASTER_SITES=   https://github.com/codership/galera/archive/
DISTVERSIONPREFIX=      release_
DISTFILES=      release_${PORTVERSION}.tar.gz

and I also removed all the documentation build code and switches, since all the documentation has been removed from the source code.

But I'm stuck on the significant patches applied to the code both inside the Makefile and in files/. The original maintainer could hopefully clean that up more easily.
